parameters.value:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-sonnet-4-6', max_tokens: 1024, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: [{ type: 'image', source: { type: 'base64', media_type: 'image/jpeg', data: $json.image_base64.replace(/^data:image/[a-z]+;base64,/, '') } }, { type: 'text', text: 'You are a lead qualifier for an Instagram outreach agency (InboundOS). We help small business owners and agency owners grow using short-form video content. Analyze this Instagram profile screenshot.

Return ONLY valid JSON with these exact fields:
{
  "ig_handle": "username without @",
  "full_name": "display name or empty string",
  "niche": "2-3 word niche description",
  "followers": "follower count as shown e.g. 12.4K",
  "qualifier": "hot or warm or cold",
  "qualifier_reason": "one sentence on why this score",
  "disqualified": false,
  "disqualify_reason": "null if not disqualified, otherwise specific reason",
  "opener_text": "a genuine 2-3 sentence personalized DM opener referencing something specific from their profile — sounds human, no pitch yet"
}

Qualifier logic:
- hot: 5K-100K followers, posts reels, clear business/agency niche, looks active
- warm: 1K-5K or 100K+ followers, some content activity, unclear niche
- cold: under 1K followers, no clear niche, looks inactive

Disqualify (set disqualified: true) if ANY of these:
- Looks like a content agency or social media agency themselves (competitor)
- Under 500 followers
- No income signal — purely personal account, meme page, or teen account
- Already a marketing/ads agency
- Inactive (no recent posts visible)
- Celebrity or mega-influencer (over 500K, unreachable)

If disqualified, set opener_text to empty string.

Return ONLY the JSON object, no markdown, no explanation.' }] }] }) }}

={{ JSON.stringify({ ig_handle: $json.ig_handle, full_name: $json.full_name || '', niche: $json.niche || '', followers: $json.followers || '', qualifier: $json.qualifier || 'warm', opener_text: $json.opener_text || '', notes: ($json.disqualified ? '⚠️ DISQUALIFIED: ' + $json.disqualify_reason : $json.qualifier_reason) || '', stage: 0, source: 'screenshot' }) }}
